theme: The Real ROI of Incentive Travel — 2026 Numbers

linkedin.text:
The ROI of incentive travel is not a feeling. It's a number.

We analyzed results across 12 incentive programs we ran in 2025. Here's what the data shows:

📊 Performance lift (6 months post-trip):
• Sales teams: +18-31% above baseline
• Operations teams: +14% efficiency improvement
• NPS score correlation: +22 points vs. non-trip years

👥 Retention impact:
• 87% of trip participants stayed for 12+ months after
• vs. 61% retention for similar roles company-wide
• ROI calculation: one retained senior hire = €50-150k saved

💡 The engagement multiplier:
• Teams that take incentive trips report 2.4x higher engagement scores
• Managers of incentive teams spend 35% less time on conflict resolution

📈 Cost-per-outcome:
Average incentive program: €3,500/person
Estimated retention value: €12,000-18,000/person saved
ROI ratio: 3.4:1 to 5.1:1

The business case isn't just competitive. It's compelling.

What's your current approach to measuring event ROI?

📩 alon@upe.co.il | 🌐 upe.co.il

#IncentiveTravel #ROI #CorporateEvents #EmployeeRetention #HRLeadership #EventROI #UproductionEvents #BusinessCase #TeamBuilding #EmployeeEngagement #MICE #CorporateStrategy
